name: codex-sdd-planner
description: Spec-driven development planning skills for requirements, designs, implementation plans, execution, review, and retrospectives.

interface.longDescription: Create and maintain research, specifications, designs, implementation plans, reviews, and retrospectives as structured Markdown artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Set up spec-driven planning for this repository.
Create a specification and implementation plan for this feature.
Review this implementation against its active plan.
